# function: cidroverlaps

Returns true if the two CIDR prefixes have any addresses in common. For CIDR prefixes, overlap means one fully contains the other — partial overlap is not possible. Both arguments must be in CIDR notation and the same address family (IPv4 or IPv6).



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
cidroverlaps(prefix_a string, prefix_b string) bool
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `prefix_a` (String) First CIDR prefix (e.g. `10.0.0.0/8` or `fd00::/16`)
1. `prefix_b` (String) Second CIDR prefix (e.g. `10.1.0.0/16` or `fd00:1::/32`)
